emergency_definition: confirmed fire alarm at monitored site

emergency_routing_rules.fallback: We've paged our emergency dispatch team and someone will contact you within 15 minutes. If there is immediate danger to life or property, please call 911.

non_emergency_routing_rules.fallback: Collect name, number, and issue for next business day callback

call_transfer_rules.transfer_fail_message: We've paged our emergency dispatch team and someone will contact you within 15 minutes. If there is immediate danger to life or property, please call 911.

integration_constraints: ServiceTrade integration required — do not create or modify records
after_hours_flow_summary: Greet caller; identify if emergency. Emergencies (types — active sprinkler discharge, fire suppression trigger...): collect name, number, address → transfer to 720-555-0148; if transfer fails after 40s, assure callback within 10 min. Non-emergencies: collect name, number, issue → confirm next-business-day callback.
office_hours_flow_summary: Office open Monday - Friday 7:30 AM–5 PM Mountain. Greet caller, identify purpose, collect name & number. Emergencies → transfer to 720-555-0148. Non-emergencies → route to main office line. Wrap-up confirm next steps.
questions_or_unknowns: Call transfer timeout not specified — defaulting to 60s
